name: leozops-ai
description: LeozOps AI — CRM data layer foundation (Client, Campaign, Lead, FunnelStage)

scripts.test: tsx --test src/__tests__/contract.test.ts src/__tests__/metrics.test.ts src/__tests__/metricsRoutes.test.ts src/__tests__/brief.test.ts src/__tests__/briefRoutes.test.ts src/__tests__/recommendations.test.ts src/__tests__/recommendationsRoutes.test.ts src/__tests__/dashboard.test.ts src/__tests__/dashboardRoutes.test.ts src/__tests__/integrations.test.ts src/__tests__/integrationsRoutes.test.ts
scripts.db:reset: tsx src/db/migrate.ts rollback && tsx src/db/migrate.ts latest && tsx src/db/seed.ts
